message:
🐛 fix: correct self-upgrade progress comment accuracy (#8050) (#8053)

Copilot review of #8048 pointed out the comment at self_upgrade.go:426
claimed a "real success broadcast happens once the deployment rollout
completes", but this handler only broadcasts update_progress for
"failed" and "running" (steps 1 and 2) and then returns. No terminal
success event is emitted over the hub from this file or from any
watcher/goroutine.

Reworded the comment to describe what actually happens: step 2 / 60%
is the last broadcast this handler emits, and clients detect rollout
completion by polling /health (see useSelfUpgrade.pollForRestart).

Fixes #8050

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
